title: 简单粗暴好用
content: 新手进去很简单，动作容易模仿，一组30秒，容易上手，音乐也好听。8岁儿子强烈要求购买
author: 学号1953760

title: Convenient
content: I found this app is very convenient. If I miss my workout at gym, I just can choose 2-3 sets from app, that will be good. It has different workouts for different levels.
author: Yayulia

title: Thank you
content: Omg 😮 amazing result.... I didn't believe it. But now I lost almost 11kg with this app app and keto... I just wanna say thank you guys. I hope everyone download this app u want losse weight.
author: Nandia from China

title: I really enjoyed my first day doing exercises.
content: It was my first day doing this in this app and I really enjoyed it.. I never do exercises but today I enjoyed doing it..

title: Good free app
content: I really enjoy doing workouts with this free app. The range of different workouts and goals is pretty cool!
